name: joai-resend
description: Connect Resend to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Resend to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
interface.longDescription: Send transactional and marketing emails from your applications. Use email templates, attachments, and tracking with Resend's email API.
defaultPrompt: List the Resend tools available in this app.
